mapper.select: SELECT r.step_num AS stepNum, IFNULL(NULLIF(TRIM(r.custom_detail), ''), p.step_detail) AS stepDetail, r.duration_seconds AS durationSeconds, r.fire_power AS firePower FROM diet_dish_step_relation r LEFT JOIN diet_cooking_step_pool p ON r.step_pool_id = p.step_pool_id WHERE r.branch_id = #{branchId} AND r.del_flag = 0 AND (p.del_flag = 0 OR p.del_flag IS NULL) ORDER BY r.step_num ASC
